external plan review not re-run for this sub-iterate: the campaign plan (Spec/shipwright-grade-plan.md section 14) already folds in the Gemini 3.1 Pro + GPT-5.4 dispositions at planning time; a fresh-context adversarial code review WAS run for G1 and its findings fixed.

surface_verification.runner: uv run --directory plugins/shipwright-grade --with pytest --with pytest-mock --with pyyaml pytest tests/ -q

behaviors.behavior: resolve_target accepts a local git repo (+bare/shallow/remote flags) and rejects URL/missing/file/non-git
synthetic_projection maps commits to conventional-type + PR/issue ref + is_traced/has_provenance; files_changed deferred; newline-safe records
RepoContext is a memoized, bounded (caps), lexicographic, within-root snapshot with a byte-capped read_text
detectors_bridge reuses adopt detectors read-only, degrades safely, writes nothing
engine_bridge loads compute_grade UNCHANGED, cached, and coexists with grade's bare modules without a scripts.lib collision

grade_inputs_projector maps events+context onto GradeInputs; lights requirement/change traceability; leaves security/deps/maint/reconciliation n/a; surfaces static inventory without scoring test-health
report_model n/a semantics (N/A, excluded, would-light, never 0), per-dimension provenance, detail override
routing decides authoritative vs heuristic incl absent/partial/stale/malformed/mixed .shipwright/
sanitize strips CSI/OSC/ESC/control/bidi and collapses to one line
renderers deterministic; hostile repo strings neutralised end-to-end; headline carries N-of-M controls measured
CLI emits terminal/markdown/json with exit codes 0/2/3 and UTF-8-encodable output
negative fixtures (bare/empty/shallow/huge+binary) degrade to n/a or Not Gradeable, never a crash
git_exec is a hardened (safe.directory/fsmonitor/pager/hooks), bounded, read-only git runner
coverage heuristic is route-specific (a bare module import does not mark every route covered)
feature-inference truncation on oversized repos is labelled sampled/truncated in requirement-traceability provenance
empirical record/replay cache round-trips and the manifest is well-formed (fields + descending bands)
same repo state yields the same grade (determinism)
empirical real-OSS band + relative-ordering assertion against pinned SHAs
behaviors.reason: needs network + gh against real GitHub repos; opt-in -m empirical suite, SHAs PENDING-G5, loud skip; the launch gate is G5
